name: Katsuragawa Electric Co., Ltd.
summary: Katsuragawa Electric Co., Ltd. develops, manufactures, and sells large format color printers, large format printers/multifunction machines, scanners, and related equipment and software. The company also provides micro motors. It sells its products in the United States, Europe, and Asia. Katsuragawa Electric Co., Ltd. was founded in 1945 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
